name: File Upload (Drag & Drop)
summary: Drag and drop file upload variant using `file-urn` format and `variant: dragdrop`
whenToUse: When a more prominent upload area is desired over a simple button
Forms where file upload is a primary action, not a secondary one
notes: Set `variant: "dragdrop"` in UI schema options for the drag-and-drop upload area
The default variant is `"button"` which renders a 'Choose file' button
Also set the `variant` property on the data schema for the upload style: `"button"` (default) or `"dragdrop"`
Uploaded files are stored in Azure Blob storage via the ADSP File Service
The field value becomes a file URN like `urn:ads:platform:file-service:v1:/files/<uuid>`
